description_long: This is a mid-rise office building with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof, featuring a rooftop mechanical structure and several HVAC units. The facade is clad in light gray stone or concrete panels, punctuated by large, evenly spaced rectangular windows arranged in a strict grid pattern across all visible sides. The ground floor includes a series of wide, dark entrances or garage doors, suggesting access for vehicles or loading. The rooftop is surrounded by a low parapet wall, and the mechanical penthouse is set back from the building edge, with visible ventilation equipment. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on function. The building's proportions and repetitive window pattern are characteristic of contemporary commercial office architecture.
description: A modern, rectangular office building with a flat roof, light gray facade, and large, evenly spaced windows. The ground floor features wide entrances, and the rooftop hosts mechanical equipment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with five rows of large windows and four wide ground-level entrances.
description_view_1: Rear view with similar window arrangement, but rooftop mechanical structures are more prominent on the right side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the central rooftop structure and HVAC units, with the same window grid.
description_view_3: Side view showing the mechanical penthouse and rooftop equipment, with consistent window pattern.
attribute_window_pattern: Uniform grid of large rectangular windows, evenly spaced in horizontal and vertical rows across all facades.
